context_packs_creator_xor.name: context_packs_creator_xor
context_packs_creator_xor.value: (creator_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (creator_human_id IS NOT NULL)

correlation_seals_caller_xor.name: correlation_seals_caller_xor
correlation_seals_caller_xor.value: (sealed_by_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (sealed_by_human_id IS NOT NULL)

daemon_profiles_creator_xor.name: daemon_profiles_creator_xor
daemon_profiles_creator_xor.value: (created_by_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (created_by_human_id IS NOT NULL)

diaries_creator_xor.name: diaries_creator_xor
diaries_creator_xor.value: (creator_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (creator_human_id IS NOT NULL)

diary_entries_creator_xor.name: diary_entries_creator_xor
diary_entries_creator_xor.value: (creator_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (creator_human_id IS NOT NULL)

groups_creator_xor.name: groups_creator_xor
groups_creator_xor.value: (creator_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (creator_human_id IS NOT NULL)

rendered_packs_creator_xor.name: rendered_packs_creator_xor
rendered_packs_creator_xor.value: (creator_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (creator_human_id IS NOT NULL)

runtime_models_creator_xor.name: runtime_models_creator_xor
runtime_models_creator_xor.value: (team_id IS NULL AND created_by_agent_id IS NULL AND created_by_human_id IS NULL) OR (team_id IS NOT NULL AND ((created_by_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (created_by_human_id IS NOT NULL)))

tasks_proposer_xor.name: tasks_proposer_xor
tasks_proposer_xor.value: (proposed_by_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (proposed_by_human_id IS NOT NULL)

tasks_canceller_xor.name: tasks_canceller_xor
tasks_canceller_xor.value: status <> 'cancelled' OR (cancelled_by_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (cancelled_by_human_id IS NOT NULL)

tasks_cancel_reason_required.name: tasks_cancel_reason_required
tasks_cancel_reason_required.value: status <> 'cancelled' OR cancel_reason IS NOT NULL

team_invites_creator_xor.name: team_invites_creator_xor
team_invites_creator_xor.value: (creator_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (creator_human_id IS NOT NULL)

teams_creator_xor.name: teams_creator_xor
teams_creator_xor.value: (creator_agent_id IS NOT NULL) <> (creator_human_id IS NOT NULL)
